html.description: The rendered review as full HTML (single self-contained doc, dark theme, inline CSS, KaTeX-rendered math)

md.description: The same review rendered as GitHub-flavored markdown

tex.description: The same review rendered as LaTeX (compilable standalone)

has_math.description: True if any KaTeX/LaTeX math was rendered

macros_used.description: Names of custom \newcommand macros extracted from the paper's TeX preamble and applied during rendering

section_count.description: Number of top-level <h2> sections in the rendered HTML
